content: Hey, I'm looking to pick up some new skills in my free time. I've been really interested in home automation lately.
That's a great hobby! Home automation can be really useful and fun. What kind of projects are you thinking of starting with?

I'm not sure yet, but I've been looking at some smart light bulbs and thermostats. I've also been wanting to learn more about blockchain development, since that's what I do for work at our DeFi protocol in Portland.
That's really cool! Blockchain development is a fascinating field. Have you considered taking any online courses or attending workshops to learn more about it?
Yeah, I've been looking at some courses on Coursera and Udemy. But it's hard to find the time with work and taking care of my aging parents.
I understand, it can be tough to balance work and family responsibilities. Maybe you could try setting aside a specific time each week to work on your skills, like Saturday mornings?
That's a great idea. I've also been thinking about getting back into marathon running, which I used to love doing. Maybe I can use my Saturday mornings to train.
That's a great way to stay active and clear your mind. Do you have a specific marathon in mind that you're training for?
Not yet, but I'm thinking about doing the Portland Marathon in October. I've done it a few times before and it's always a lot of fun.
That sounds like a great goal! Make sure to give yourself plenty of time to train and prepare. Have you thought about how you'll balance your training with your work and family responsibilities?
Yeah, it'll be a challenge, but I'm hoping to get my parents set up with some smart home devices that will make it easier for me to keep an eye on them while I'm out training.
That's a great idea! Smart home devices can be really helpful for caregivers. What kind of devices are you thinking of getting for your parents?
I'm not sure yet, but I've been looking at some options like smart speakers and security cameras. I've also been wanting to learn more about leatherworking, which is another hobby of mine.
Leatherworking is a great hobby! You could try making some leather goods for your parents, like wallets or bags. It could be a fun way to spend time together and create something useful.
That's a great idea! I'll have to look into it. I've also been thinking about getting back into DJing, which I used to do in college.
That's a great way to express yourself creatively! Do you have any favorite DJs or genres of music that you like to listen to?
Yeah, I love techno and house music. I used to spin at parties and clubs all the time when I was in college.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Maybe you could try getting back into it by practicing at home or spinning at local events.
Yeah, that's a great idea. I'll have to look into it. Thanks for the suggestions!
No problem, happy to help! It was great chatting with you, River.
Yeah, same to you! I'll talk to you later.
Sounds good, take care!
You too, bye!
Bye!
